core_tasks: Automated implementation of quality training camp project
Automated management of daily quality inspection entry/exit pool personnel
Design follow-up training directions based on entry/exit pool personnel
Project progress tracking and report generation

time_concept_specification.core_rule: Today checks yesterday's work orders, tomorrow issues today's quality inspection data
time_concept_specification.time_relationship: Work order generation day → (+1 day) → Work order sampling day → (+1 day) → Quality inspection daily report file issuance day (= natural day)

daily_date_relationship.file_naming_rule: Quality daily report is named after work order date

example_2026_04_12.file_title: 0410 Technical Support Center 2 Quality Daily Report.xlsx
example_2026_04_12.explanation: File is named after work order date (0410), not quality data date (0411)

time_concept_specification.report_naming: MMDD Technical Support Center 2 Quality Daily Report.xlsx

exception_handling.long_holiday_merge: Merged release, naming like [Start date-End date] Technical Support Center 2 Quality Daily Report

entry_exit_pool_rules.update_reason: 补充虚假工单入池规则（中英文队列均适用）

penalty_severity_hierarchy.description: 扣罚严重程度等级（由低到高）
levels: 普通扣分（质检得分<95但无当通为零/当月为零/虚假）
penalty_severity_hierarchy.rule: 入池规则中的'及以上程度'=本级及更高等级的扣罚

entry_conditions: Single 'monthly zero' or above penalty (including 虚假工单)
Two consecutive weeks of 'current pass zero' (natural week)
chinese_queue.exit_conditions: 14 consecutive days without 'current pass zero' or above penalty (including entry day)
chinese_queue.refresh_rules: New penalty within 14 days (including 虚假工单) refreshes entry time
chinese_queue.exit_observation_period: Natural days consecutive calculation (e.g., March 30 entry, observation period March 30-April 12)

english_queue.entry_conditions: Single 'current pass zero' or above penalty (including 虚假工单)
english_queue.exit_conditions: 7 consecutive days without 'current pass zero' or above penalty
english_queue.refresh_rules: New penalty within 7 days (including 虚假工单) refreshes entry time

key_rules.entry_execution_day: Quality inspection daily report file issuance day
key_rules.exit_calculation: Including entry day, calculated by consecutive natural days
key_rules.consecutive_weeks_definition: Judged by natural week, not any 14 days

false_work_order_rule.description: 虚假工单属于'及以上程度'扣罚，中英文队列均适用

chinese_queue.entry: 单次虚假工单及以上程度 → 当日入池（同当月为零规则）
chinese_queue.refresh: 在池期间出现虚假工单 → 入池时间刷新

english_queue.entry: 单次虚假工单及以上程度 → 当日入池（同当通为零规则）
english_queue.refresh: 在池期间出现虚假工单 → 入池时间刷新

main_content: Business domain classification (service specifications, case handling, work order backfilling)
Special rule system (accumulation rules, protection rules)
Precise mapping with entry/exit pool rules

directory_structure.data: Store raw data, processed data files
directory_structure.reports: Daily reports, analysis reports, summary reports

security_rules.operation_request: All file modification operations must be requested
security_rules.simulation_test: Simulation testing must be performed before operation

communication_specification.request_format: [Request] Need to execute XXX operation, affecting file YYY, please confirm.
communication_specification.status_feedback: [Status] Task: XXX, Progress: X/Y, Current: ZZZ
communication_specification.report_time: Automatically generate summary report at 20:00 daily

group_filtering_rules.rule_description: The following groups do not belong to Technical Support Center 2 and do not participate in training camp entry/exit pool rules. Daily data analysis does not need to analyze data from these two organizations.

scheme_A_complete_filtering.description: Exclude data from these two groups at the data reading stage, completely not participating in any processing flow
scheme_A_complete_filtering.advantages: Highest efficiency, reduces data processing volume
scheme_A_complete_filtering.disadvantages: Incomplete data, cannot view raw data of excluded groups

scheme_B_read_not_process.description: Read all data, but exclude data from these two groups during analysis and display stages
scheme_B_read_not_process.advantages: Complete data, can view raw data

filtering_logic.data_reading: Decide whether to read data from excluded groups based on selected scheme
filtering_logic.data_analysis: Completely do not analyze data from excluded groups
filtering_logic.data_display: Completely do not display data from excluded groups
filtering_logic.historical_records: Imported records from excluded groups marked as 'non-center-2-groups'
filtering_logic.report_generation: Reports completely do not contain any information from excluded groups

technical_implementation.validation_logic: Group field validation and multi-level filtering
technical_implementation.error_handling: Unknown group prompt, record and skip

history_penalty_table_processing.update_reason: Optimize field data source mapping and '是否已处理' field automation logic

关联记录ID.generation_rule: 自动生成，基于日期和序号

组别1.validation: 必须从质检日报'组别'列读取

姓名.validation: 必须从质检日报'姓名'列读取

工单编号.validation: 必须从质检日报'工单编号'列读取

工单处理完成时间.validation: 必须从质检日报'工单处理完成时间'列读取
工单处理完成时间.processing: 日期字符串转换为时间戳（毫秒）

扣罚类型.field_name: 当通为零/当月为零/虚假
扣罚类型.validation: 根据质检日报扣罚字段判断
扣罚类型.note: 扣罚等级：当通为零 < 当月为零 < 虚假工单 < 团队红线，'及以上程度'规则涵盖所有更高级别扣罚

扣罚详情.validation: 从质检日报'备注'列提取
扣罚详情.processing: 提取关键扣罚描述，可组合多个字段

是否已处理.validation: 根据出入池规则自动设置
是否已处理.automation: 完全自动化，无需人工手动更改

备注.content: 添加处理说明和来源信息
备注.example: 0408质检日报 - 需要入池（英文队列单次当通为零）

operations: 设置'是否已处理'字段状态
pre_check_phase.output: 预检报告 + 历史扣罚表记录

operations: 查询'是否已处理' = '否'的记录
formal_execution_phase.output: 训练营表格更新 + 状态同步

data_validation_rules.field_existence_check: 确保质检日报有对应列

data_reading_errors.missing_fields: 记录错误并跳过该记录

quality_assurance.double_validation: 规则验证 + 数据验证
quality_assurance.automation_level: 完全自动化，无需人工干预
quality_assurance.traceability: 完整操作记录和决策追溯
